channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Omo-Agege Joins NDC to Contest Delta Central Senatorial Seat in 2027
item.description: Senator Ovie Omo-Agege, wey be former Deputy President of the Senate, don officially defect from the ruling APC go join the Nigeria Democratic Congress (NDC). Him don also declare say him wan run for ...

item.title: Notable scenes exposing Lara and Felix’s deception in ‘Blood vs Duty’
item.description: The latest episodes of “Blood vs Duty” have captured viewers’ attention as they expose the hidden schemes of Lara Angeles and Felix Domingo. Throughout the series, there are ten particularly memorable...

item.title: Israeli airstrikes in southern Lebanon kill 12, including children, amid rising tensions
item.description: Lebanon has reported that Israeli strikes on its southern regions have killed 12 people, including two children, and injured 21 others. The attacks targeted multiple locations, including the cities of...

item.title: Jeffrey Sachs Urges Germany to Pursue Direct Diplomacy with Russia and Reassess Post-Cold War Security Policy
item.description: This article presents an open letter by economist Jeffrey D. Sachs addressed to German Chancellor Friedrich Merz, urging Germany to take a leading role in promoting negotiations with Russia to end the...

item.title: US and Iran negotiate potential ceasefire extension amid ongoing tensions
item.description: The United States and Iran continue negotiations over a possible extension of their ceasefire, with US officials warning that their patience is not unlimited. Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent cited co...

item.title: 3D Artist Carlos Antón Varó Creates Modular Elemental Creatures Inspired by Classical Forces
item.description: Spanish 3D artist Carlos Antón Varó presents a visually distinctive series titled GOLEM3NTS, featuring imaginative digital creatures inspired by the classical elements of earth, water, and air. Each c...

item.title: Top Dividend-Paying Companies Leading in Battery Storage Technology
item.description: As demand for energy storage solutions grows, several companies are emerging as leaders in providing sustainable dividends while advancing battery technology. Ford Motor Co. is shifting its focus from...

item.title: Sir Paul McCartney discusses his long-standing vegetarian lifestyle on Chicken Shop Date
item.description: Sir Paul McCartney, the 83-year-old former Beatle, has appeared on Amelia Dimoldenberg’s popular interview series Chicken Shop Date, where he enjoyed vegan nuggets and chips while reflecting on his de...

item.title: Mike Pence says he rarely communicates with Donald Trump and reflects on post-2020 split
item.description: Former Vice President Mike Pence discussed the current state of his relationship with former President Donald Trump during an appearance at the 2026 Mackinac Policy Conference in Michigan. Pence ackno...

item.title: American arrested after minors found in Cebu condominium
item.description: An American national was arrested in Cebu City after being found in the company of two boys inside a condominium unit. The arrest was carried out by the National Bureau of Investigation (NBI) on Sunda...

item.title: Fire destroys long-term care facility under construction in Penticton, British Columbia, prompting evacuations
item.description: A large fire broke out at a long-term care facility that was under construction in Penticton, British Columbia, causing significant damage and leading to evacuations in the surrounding area. According...

item.title: Adivasi communities call for halt to tiger safari expansion and forest eviction drives in southern India
item.description: Adivasi communities from forest regions across Karnataka, Kerala and Tamil Nadu have strongly opposed ongoing tiger reserve expansion, wildlife tourism projects, and reported eviction drives from fore...

item.title: Philippines and Japan Launch Talks on Military Information Security Pact to Strengthen Defense Ties
item.description: President Ferdinand Marcos Jr. announced that the Philippines and Japan have agreed to begin formal negotiations for a General Security of Military Information Agreement (GSOMIA), a key framework that...

item.title: Three Casual Workers Die During Septic Tank Cleaning at Makindu Boys High School
item.description: Tragic scenes unfolded at Makindu Boys High School in Makueni County on Thursday morning after three casual labourers died while manually cleaning a school septic tank. The first victim, Maurice Mutia...

item.title: Court disputes credibility of Brown Mogotsi’s residential address in ongoing bail hearing
item.description: The bail application of businessman Brown Mogotsi in the Johannesburg magistrate’s court has been dominated by a dispute over the validity of his residential address, with prosecutors questioning whet...

item.title: Tanzania President calls police to uphold ethics, discipline to sustains public trust amid evolving security threats
item.description: Tanzania’s President Samia Suluhu Hassan has urged the national police to elevate professionalism, discipline, and public trust in the face of modern security challenges. Speaking at a police graduati...

item.title: New Zealand dismantles standalone environment department to form a mega-ministry, triggering bipartisan and public backlash
item.description: New Zealand’s government has passed legislation to dismantle the Ministry for the Environment and fold its functions into a broader new body—the MCERT mega-ministry, which will oversee housing, urban ...

item.title: Tanzania Police Force graduates officers and assistant inspectors after specialised training programme
item.description: The Tanzania Police Force has successfully concluded a specialised training programme for police officers and assistant inspectors, marking an important step in strengthening professional capacity wit...

item.title: Five villagers rescued from flooded abandoned mine in Laos, two still missing
item.description: Five villagers have been successfully rescued from a flooded cave system in Laos after being trapped for approximately one week, while two others remain missing. The group of seven became stranded on ...

item.title: No bettors won Superlotto 6/49 and Lotto 6/42 jackpots on May 28, 2026
item.description: Iniulat ng Philippine Charity Sweepstakes Office (PCSO) na walang nanalo sa dalawang major lotto jackpot draws na ginanap noong May 28, 2026. Ayon sa ahensya, walang bettor na nakakuha ng tamang winni...
